home.title: Developer Toolbox
home.subtitle: Simple, fast, and free online developer tools

jsonFormatter.name: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.desc: Format, validate, minify JSON — plus natural-language query and schema inference

ai.title: AI data assistant
ai.subtitle: Ask questions in plain words, or infer schema & field dictionary automatically
ai.queryPlaceholder: e.g. give me all user names where status=active
ai.s2: count items in tools array where status=live

markdownPreview.name: Markdown Preview
markdownPreview.desc: Render Markdown in real time with GFM tables, task lists and code
markdownPreview.f1Desc: Renders as you type, synced scroll
markdownPreview.f4Desc: Copy rendered HTML or raw Markdown

ai.hint: Select any text in the editor to summon AI rewrite

imageCompress.name: Image Compress
imageCompress.desc: Compress JPEG/PNG/WebP in your browser with quality and max-size control — 100% local

timestamp.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.desc: Two-way Unix timestamp ↔ date conversion, showing your local system time

ai.title: Natural-language time parser
ai.subtitle: Describe a time in plain words — AI converts it to a precise timestamp
ai.placeholder: e.g. next Friday 3pm, three days ago, 1 billion seconds after epoch
ai.s2: three days ago at this time

removeBg.name: AI Remove Background
removeBg.desc: Cut out image background with a WASM AI model running 100% in your browser
removeBg.modelHint: First use downloads a ~60 MB model to your browser (cached afterwards)
removeBg.privacyDesc: The AI model runs in your browser via WebAssembly — your images never leave your device.

removeWatermark.name: AI Remove Watermark
removeWatermark.desc: Brush over a watermark and let LaMa inpainting reconstruct what was behind it
removeWatermark.legalTitle: Only use on content you own.
removeWatermark.legalDesc: Removing other people's watermarks or copyright marks may violate IP laws. Make sure you have the right to edit this image.
removeWatermark.modelHint: First use downloads the ~215 MB LaMa model (browser-cached)
removeWatermark.editLabel: Editor (brush over the region to remove)
removeWatermark.processingHint: Analyzing the masked region and reconstructing pixels — usually 5-15 seconds
removeWatermark.privacyDesc: The LaMa model runs entirely in your browser via WebAssembly. Images and inference never leave your device. The model file is downloaded once from Hugging Face and then cached.
